**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Fute Technology Co., Ltd. presents a spectacular case of an abandoned legacy joint venture that has been hollowed out and repurposed into an extreme 'catch-all' paper shell. Although tagged as a 'Large' manufacturing enterprise with a fully paid-in capital of 10 million USD, it reported 0 insured employees in 2024. Its registered address ('Room B238, Building D4') is a micro-office/virtual node in Jiangbei New Area. The most glaring anomaly is its business scope: originally focused on 'storage batteries', it has recently bolted on dozens of entirely unrelated, high-barrier industries—ranging from 'Class II/III medical devices' and 'marine engineering equipment' to 'desalination', 'AI software', and 'blockchain technology'. It is physically and logically impossible for a zero-employee micro-office to execute this scope. This entity is conclusively a dormant, high-capital shell maintained for speculative bidding, IP holding, or cross-industry license hoarding.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 76)
Operational Status: ACTIVE (ON PAPER) / DORMANT MULTI-LICENSE SHELL
